'''shakuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaball|seaball]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaball|seaball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shakuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shækikith|shækikith]] || [[word:shækikij|shækikij]] || [[word:shækikish|shækikish]] || [[word:shækiki|shækiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shakukukuth|shakukukuth]] || [[word:shakukukuj|shakukukuj]] || [[word:shakukukush|shakukukush]] || [[word:shakukuku|shakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shakukuth|shakukuth]] || [[word:shakukuj|shakukuj]] || [[word:shakukush|shakukush]] || [[word:shakuku|shakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shakufkuth|shakufkuth]] || [[word:shakufkuj|shakufkuj]] || [[word:shakufkush|shakufkush]] || [[word:shakufkuf|shakufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shakukuthu|shakukuthu]] || [[word:shakukuju|shakukuju]] || [[word:shakukushu|shakukushu]] || [[word:shakukuku|shakukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shakukuth|shakukuth]] || [[word:shakukuj|shakukuj]] || [[word:shakukush|shakukush]] || [[word:shakuku|shakuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shakukuthul|shakukuthul]] || [[word:shakukujul|shakukujul]] || [[word:shakukushul|shakukushul]] || [[word:shakukukul|shakukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shakukuthuthu|shakukuthuthu]] || [[word:shakukujuju|shakukujuju]] || [[word:shakukushushu|shakukushushu]] || [[word:shakukuku|shakukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shakukuthun|shakukuthun]] || [[word:shakukujun|shakukujun]] || [[word:shakukushun|shakukushun]] || [[word:shakukukun|shakukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shakukuthuoro|shakukuthuoro]] || [[word:shakukujuoro|shakukujuoro]] || [[word:shakukushuoro|shakukushuoro]] || [[word:shakukukuoro|shakukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
